items.headline: McCarthy's slam sails above foul pole as Rockies take home finale

news_items.headline: Braves' Kim set for '26 debut; White to 7-day IL
news_items.summary: Braves shortstop Ha-Seong Kim was activated from the IL, clearing the way for his season debut, while Eli White was placed on the seven-day concussion IL.

news_items.headline: Correa 'doing well' after season-ending surgery
news_items.summary: Astros star infielder Carlos Correa is "doing well" after having season-ending surgery to repair a torn tendon in his left ankle Monday, manager Joe Espada said.

news_items.headline: Boras: Tigers ace Skubal could have short rehab
news_items.summary: Tigers ace Skubal could return sooner than the typical multimonth timeline typical of pitchers who undergo his procedure, according to agent Scott Boras.

news_items.headline: Cárdenas, MLB Spanish broadcast pioneer, dies
news_items.summary: René Cárdenas, the first Spanish-language broadcaster for the Dodgers, Astros and Rangers during a 60-year career, has died. He was 96.

news_items.headline: Rangers scratch Eovaldi due to side tightness
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Nathan Eovaldi was scratched from his scheduled start Monday against the Diamondbacks night because of left side tightness.

news_items.headline: Jays' Barger (elbow) to IL after 101.2 mph assist
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays put outfielder Addison Barger back on the injured list with right elbow inflammation and designated left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer for assignment.

news_items.headline: Guardians' Vogt misses 2nd game with infection
news_items.summary: Guardians manager Stephen Vogt will miss his second straight game Monday night because of a viral infection.

news_items.headline: José Caballero injury update: Yankees shortstop to undergo tests on finger
news_items.summary: Yankees shortstop José Caballero will be sent back to New York for tests on his right middle finger after he injured it while diving back into a base.

news_items.headline: Texas Rangers lineup for May 11, 2026
news_items.summary: Texas takes on the D-Backs in a bullpen game

news_items.headline: René Cárdenas, broadcasting pioneer who was Dodgers' first Spanish-language announcer, dies
news_items.summary: René Cárdenas, the first radio announcer to broadcast major league baseball games in Spanish to a domestic audience while with the Dodgers, has died.

news_items.headline: 2026 Texas Rangers Recap: Week Seven
Witt claims 3rd career Player of the Week honor; Sánchez earns his 1st
Blue Jays Roster Moves
news_items.summary: This morning, our head Tom reported that Yariel Rodriguez was coming up and speculated that Eric Lauer might be the roster casualty. He was right, as Lauer caught a DFA this morning and his roster spot has gone to Rodriguez. It’s been a rough season for Lauer. As Tom noted, his velocity is down. for […]

news_items.headline: Yankees' Jose Caballero out of Monday's lineup vs. Orioles due to right middle finger injury
news_items.summary: Yankees shortstop Jose Caballero is out of Monday night’s lineup against the Baltimore Orioles due to a right middle finger injury.

news_items.summary: The Dodgers offense has scuffled over the past two weeks in some unexpected ways.

news_items.headline: Braves OF Eli White goes on 7-day concussion list after running into wall for highlight catch vs. Dodgers
news_items.summary: White ran down Max Muncy's deep drive to right field, but ran face-first into the wall after making the catch.
